---
name: Feature request
about: A capability you'd like the CLI to add
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**What's the problem?**
Describe the workflow you wanted to do and where you got stuck. The
more specific the agent / human use case, the easier it is to evaluate.

**What did you try?**
Even partial approaches help — they show the surface you already
explored.

**Sketch of the API**
If you have a `gorgias-pp-cli <new-verb> --flag1 --flag2` shape in mind,
write it out. Doesn't have to be final.

**Is this a Gorgias-API-side feature or a CLI-side feature?**
The CLI passes through to the Gorgias REST API for most endpoints —
features that need new Gorgias API support are out of this repo's
scope. Local-mirror, MCP-tooling, and agent-UX features are in scope.
